mnemonics.title: Architecture Timeline: FKMPVTAH
mnemonics.content: Remember NVIDIA architecture generations in order: Fermi, Kepler, Maxwell, Pascal, Volta, Turing, Ampere, Hopper -- 'Five Kings May Pass Valleys To Alpine Heights'

mnemonics.title: Tensor Cores Start at 7.0
mnemonics.content: Tensor Cores arrived with Volta (CC 7.0). Think: 'Lucky number 7 brought Tensors.' Each subsequent generation improved Tensor Cores: 2nd gen (Turing 7.5), 3rd gen (Ampere 8.x), 4th gen (Hopper 9.0).
